acceptedAnswer.text: ITAT Mumbai Bench is located at Pratyaksha Kar Bhawan, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Mumbai. Virtual hearings are also available through the ITAT video conferencing system. We handle both physical and virtual appearances.

mainEntity.name: Can you help with angel tax (Section 56(2)(viib)) appeals in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Angel tax disputes are common for Mumbai startups. We handle appeals against Section 56(2)(viib) additions, including valuation report defence, DPIIT exemption claims, and arguments based on recent judicial precedents and CBDT circulars.

mainEntity.name: What percentage of income tax appeals succeed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Success depends on the quality of grounds and legal arguments. ITAT statistics show approximately 30-40% of appeals result in full or partial relief. Our case-specific analysis before filing ensures we pursue appeals only where strong grounds exist.
